title: Get in Touch
subtitle: We'd love to hear from you — whether you're curious, ready to join, or just want to say hi.

info.title: Connect With Us
info.description: We're a small community that meets weekly for Bible study, events, and fellowship. Here's how you can reach us:

form.title: Send a Message
form.subtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.

fields.label: Subject
options: I want to suggest a resource

fields.label: Message
fields.placeholder: Tell us what's on your mind...

successMessage.title: Message Sent!
successMessage.description: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you soon.

errorMessage.title: Something Went Wrong
errorMessage.description: There was a problem sending your message. Please try again or email us directly at nextgen@gbc.org.
